Total Points: 100

Week 5 | Assignment: Credible Sources and APA

Credible Sources and APA
Introduction
Due by the end of the week.

In this assignment, you will gain practice in identifying credible source material from uncredible sources and clearly explain why the source is considered credible. You will also get practice with using a quote and paraphrase, then document it using in-text citations and a reference.
